title: Values Training Notes (May 2022)
html:
Notes from a values-defining training (likely Sales Sniper / agency-coaching content — links to a Vimeo video and a David Riggs Loom). Frames core values as the non-negotiables that govern 50–80% of organizational behavior, especially under stress. Five-step "How to Make Values" process: list non-negotiables, segregate aspirational vs required, ideate slogans, align core team, roll out training.

TL;DR

  • Coaching/agency-build training notes on defining company core values — likely aeo agency / Sales Sniper era prep.
  • Values claimed to govern 50-80% of org behavior, especially in ambiguity/stress/crisis.
  • Five-step process: list, segregate aspirational vs required, slogan, align, roll out.
  • References David Riggs (Loom) and a Notion "Client Values Example" template.
  • Pairs with later brotein / rankett founder values work — earliest "build the operating manual" doc.

aeo agency · brotein · elevator pitch · value proposition as distinction
